items.title: Luis Serrano Academy · YouTube监控
items.titleOriginal: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG), Search, and Vector Databases
items.titleZh: 检索增强生成 (RAG)、搜索和矢量数据库
items.summary:
如何让你的LLM说实话？使用检索增强生成 (RAG)。在此视频中了解有关 RAG、搜索和矢量数据库的所有信息！

它补充了与 @meilisearch 合作撰写的一系列帖子 
https://www.meilisearch.com/blog/retrieve-and-gain
https://www.meilisearch.com/blog/rag-with-meilisearch
https://www.meilisearch.com/blog/mastering-rag

在这里查看美丽搜索平台！
https://www.meilisearch.com/
items.summaryOriginal:
How do you get your LLM to speak factually? Using Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG).Learn all about RAG, search, and vector databases in this video!

It complements a series of posts written in collaboration with @meilisearch 
https://www.meilisearch.com/blog/retrieve-and-gain
https://www.meilisearch.com/blog/rag-with-meilisearch
https://www.meilisearch.com/blog/mastering-rag

Check out the Meilisearch platform here!
https://www.meilisearch.com/
